Virgil Galan
Technical Director | Digital Transformation | Cloud & Agile Delivery

PROFILE
Virgil Galan is a technical director with over 15 years of experience in software engineering and programme delivery. He has led large-scale digital transformation initiatives across financial services, hospitality, and retail sectors. Expertise spans cloud architecture, agile at scale, and cross-functional team leadership.

COMPETENCIES
Agile Delivery | Cloud Architecture | Stakeholder Management | Budget Control | Risk Management | Team Leadership | Digital Transformation | DevOps

EDUCATION
MSc Computer Science – Polytechnic University of Bucharest, 2005

CERTIFICATIONS
PMP | AWS Solutions Architect Associate | PRINCE2 Practitioner

METHODOLOGIES
Scrum | Kanban | SAFe | PRINCE2 | Lean

TECHNOLOGIES
AWS | Azure | GCP | Kubernetes | Terraform | Ansible | Docker | Jenkins | GitLab CI | Jira | Confluence | Salesforce | Python | Java | Node.js

EXPERIENCE

Cognizant Softvision | Technical Director | Jan 2018 – Present
- Led a 60-person delivery organisation across Romania, India, and the US.
- Managed annual programme budget of $8M.

  Hospitality – Hotel Booking Platform | 2022–2025
  - Architected microservices migration from monolithic legacy system.
  - Reduced deployment lead time by 60% via CI/CD pipeline automation.
  - Delivered MVP on schedule within 9 months.

  Retail – E-Commerce Replatforming | 2020–2022
  - Led technical discovery and solution design for a £12M replatforming programme.
  - Onboarded and mentored a 25-person engineering team.

Accenture | Senior Manager | Mar 2014 – Dec 2017
- Directed delivery of core banking modernisation programmes across 3 European markets.
- Introduced SAFe methodology reducing time-to-market by 35%.

  Core Banking Modernisation | 2015–2017
  - Delivered phased migration of 4 legacy banking systems to cloud-native architecture.
  - Coordinated work across 8 vendor teams and 120 stakeholders.
